lessons.title: Get started with Azure Stream Analytics
lessons.content_md:
Get started with Azure Stream Analytics

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/introduction-to-data-streaming/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Get started with Azure Stream Analytics

lessons.title: Ingest streaming data using Azure Stream Analytics
lessons.content_md:
Azure Stream Analytics is a fully managed real-time analytics service that you can use to process streaming event data and route results to a range of output destinations for storage, analysis, and visualization.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/ingest-streaming-data-use-azure-stream-analytics-synapse/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Ingest streaming data using Azure Stream Analytics

lessons.title: Visualize real-time data with Azure Stream Analytics and Power BI
lessons.content_md:
By combining the stream processing capabilities of Azure Stream Analytics and the data visualization capabilities of Microsoft Power BI, you can create real-time data dashboards.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/visualize-real-time-data-azure-stream-analytics-power-bi/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Visualize real-time data with Azure Stream Analytics and Power BI

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Implement a Data Streaming Solution with Azure Stream Analytics
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Implement a Data Streaming Solution with Azure Stream Analytics**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
